ns0:entry.ns0:title: AprilRobotics/apriltag
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AprilRobotics/apriltag
Language: c
AprilTag is a visual fiducial system popular for robotics research.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DynamoRIO/dynamorio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DynamoRIO/dynamorio
Language: c
Dynamic Instrumentation Tool Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OP-TEE/optee_os
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OP-TEE/optee_os
Language: c
Trusted side of the TEE

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fwupd/fwupd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fwupd/fwupd
Language: c
A system daemon to allow session software to update firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libexpat/libexpat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libexpat/libexpat
Language: c
🌿 Fast streaming XML parser written in C99 with >90% test coverage; moved from SourceForge to GitHub

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mcu-tools/mcuboot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mcu-tools/mcuboot
Language: c
Secure boot for 32-bit Microcontrollers!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: php/php-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/php/php-src
Language: c
The PHP Interpreter

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pjsip/pjproject
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pjsip/pjproject
Language: c
PJSIP project

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redcanaryco/atomic-red-team
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team
Language: c
Small and highly portable detection tests based on MITRE's ATT&CK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
Language: c
Scripts which perform an installable binary image build for SONiC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: taosdata/TDengine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/taosdata/TDengine
Language: c
High-performance, scalable time-series database designed for Industrial IoT (IIoT) scenarios

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valinet/ExplorerPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valinet/ExplorerPatcher
Language: c
This project aims to enhance the working environment on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ https://windows-internals.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
